pipeline.name: CI
pipeline.description: CI Testing of the vLLM Repo
pipeline.configuration:
steps:
  - label: "bootstrap"
    key: bootstrap
    agents:
      queue: small_cpu_queue_premerge
    retry:
      automatic:
        - exit_status: -1  # Agent was lost
          limit: 2
        - exit_status: -10  # Agent was lost
          limit: 2
        - exit_status: 22
          limit: 2
    commands:
      - |
        if [[ -f .buildkite/.pipeline_gen_v2 ]]; then
          if [[ -n "${VLLM_CI_BRANCH:-}" ]]; then
            pip install "git+https://github.com/vllm-project/ci-infra.git@${VLLM_CI_BRANCH}#subdirectory=buildkite/pipeline_generator"
          else
            pip install git+https://github.com/vllm-project/ci-infra.git@main#subdirectory=buildkite/pipeline_generator
          fi
          /var/lib/buildkite-agent/.local/bin/pipeline-generator --pipeline_config_path .buildkite/ci_config.yaml --output_file_path .buildkite/pipeline.yaml
          if [ -f .buildkite/.docs_only ]; then exit 0; fi
          buildkite-agent artifact upload .buildkite/pipeline.yaml
          buildkite-agent pipeline upload .buildkite/pipeline.yaml
          exit 0
        fi
      - if [[ -n "$VLLM_CI_BRANCH" ]]; then VLLM_CI_BRANCH=$VLLM_CI_BRANCH curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra/$VLLM_CI_BRANCH/buildkite/bootstrap.sh" | bash && exit 0; fi
      - curl -sSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vllm-project/ci-infra/main/buildkite/bootstrap.sh" | bash
